75513.subject: Visa and Stripe back Open USD, a stablecoin that pays its partners рҹҳірҹӘҷ; рқ•Ҹ Money just launched with 6% APY and a вҖҰ
75513.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse406

рҹ‘Ӣ Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a рҹ”“ weekly free edition рҹ”“ of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, itвҖҷs the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If youвҖҷre not a subscriber, hereвҖҷs what you missed this week:
Claude Fable 5 Is Back. HereвҖҷs Exactly What to Build Before the Free Window Closes [ https://substack.com/redirect/f6fcb96d-73f8-4308-8b47-f18c0865b8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] вҢӣ [ https://substack.com/redirect/f6fcb96d-73f8-4308-8b47-f18c0865b8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The highest-leverage use cases, money-making workflows, and copy-paste prompts for founders, builders, investors, and entrepreneurs, while Fable 5 is still included in your plan]
Attention Is the New Startup Infrastructure: The FounderвҖҷs Playbook for Winning in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/5f218282-4884-4031-932d-8306629fdad7?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] рҹ“ҡ [ https://substack.com/redirect/5f218282-4884-4031-932d-8306629fdad7?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Inside a16zвҖҷs вҖңgo-direct as a serviceвҖқ model вҖ” and the exact moves founders need to turn attention into customers, hires, and capital]
GLM-5.2: The ChatGPT Moment for Local AI [ https://substack.com/redirect/14ad03d9-7f0a-4d34-b95c-a155f3bc1468?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] рҹӨ– [ https://substack.com/redirect/14ad03d9-7f0a-4d34-b95c-a155f3bc1468?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Why the first open-weight model that rivals Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 вҖ” and runs on a single Mac вҖ” changes the game for every founder, builder, and investor]
Turn Claude Into an AI Research Powerhouse With StanfordвҖҷs STORM Method [ https://substack.com/redirect/3f947e5a-f650-40eb-9904-3e81a2d35950?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] рҹ§  [ https://substack.com/redirect/3f947e5a-f650-40eb-9904-3e81a2d35950?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [StanfordвҖҷs proven AI research framework, adapted for Claude вҖ” with copy-paste prompts and a ready-made Skill]
SoFiвҖҷs Q1 2026: the Everything App is becoming an everything earner [ https://substack.com/redirect/b562cdfe-8716-4f4f-b127-aac25673ab1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] рҹ“ұрҹ’ё [ https://substack.com/redirect/b562cdfe-8716-4f4f-b127-aac25673ab1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [deep dive into SoFiвҖҷs Q1 2026, breaking the most importat financial facts & figures to see if itвҖҷs worth your time and money + bonus deep dives into Robinhood [ htt

75512.subject: Has China obtained the worldвҖҷs most important machine?
75512.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEkrP_MFWrtXkla6LCO-H3XhmkksjA4ciiUlVYsYjf9MBgZ3-qkPuaECagvXzKGbUcXO5k2kyo7UZVY7RUbf5z92eQnSaufYrcvl6IfIKw 

July 5th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 A Sunday edition of our daily newsletter


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEksHlWCO4D39iEEkHATyqwWvToFjXagHGNEYAQ5oxjUG2NUj4IkZ7Wpk1UOWed5SCl05Kkpr2AJTD0CT0EclFgoMJE_Z9-oYz0vJgm2Tw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEktUg8EEDBpN2JbnsQn-WyykWR44_Fxnftn60GcIDKhDRHPW7nP3isgiE_twO82SxXEqDI4l8OhShvK7GhRLnywgw_y8M6if4n81JtPvA 


 


 
 

Roger McShane

US digital editor



The extreme ultraviolet lithography machine, which makes the most advanced semiconductors, is arguably the world’s most important device. It is made only by ASML, a Dutch company. Now the Trump administration has thrown the firm into crisis by warning that one of its 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAAAA521sEkuwKFynGh3fpKpjOqtl0S_taG08_BcqfLXiN_j-q6-hr5IYh3PWKrZK4bYWC-FTzQ0ewudrGtom-fAK_BDTmVMp00I-Pmi0qKl 
machines may have reached China . Impossible, says ASML.


Elsewhere, women have made extraordinary professional gains in recent decades. Yet their progress at the very top has stalled: their share of C-suite positions is falling. 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjh9AAcAAAA

75510.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Oleh Bezuhlyi


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-5-oleh-bezuhlyi-rvhzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BFeLD0tfKQymx6%2BKNZ8Q22Q%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0TAthfZCQMwIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr7ztblx~rl-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr7ztblx-rl
  
рҹ§  AI's Crypto News Brief: Bitcoin and Ether are clawing back from multi-year lows as ETF buyers return, even as regulators tighten their grip on stablecoins and prediction markets, and Bitcoin's own community squares off over a contentious protocol upgrade. рҹ“Ҳ Bitcoin, Ether Rally as ETF Buyers Return Bitcoin and Ether bounced off multi-year lows as dip buyers stepped back into the market. Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a $221 million inflow on July 2, signaling renewed institutional appetite after weeks of extreme-fear sentiment. Read full story рҹҸӣпёҸ SEC's Atkins Touts "Historic Steps" Toward On-Chain Markets SEC Chairman Paul Atkins said the agency is accelerating efforts to modernize US financial markets by moving them on-chain. His remarks, delivered at an economic policy event, align with the administration's push to position the US as a leading crypto hub. More details рҹҸҰ BIS: Stablecoins Can't Function Without Central Banks The Bank for International Settlements argued that stablecoins ultimately depend on central bank infrastructure to operate reliably. The report frames that reliance as a risk to monetary sovereignty and calls for tighter, unified oversight of the sector. Read more вҡҷпёҸ Bitcoin's BIP-110 Fork Fight Hits an August Deadline A brewing dispute over Bitcoin's proposed BIP-110 upgrade is forcing exchanges, wallets, and mining pools to declare their positions ahead of an August lock-in window. Miner support currently sits at a thin 0.42%, leaving the fork's fate very much unresolved. See details вҡ пёҸ Polymarket Faces Scrutiny Over Deceptive Marketing Polymarket is facing allegations that it used fake trades and paid influencers to inflate its platform's visibility. The claims could invite fresh regulatory attention to prediction markets, a sector already under pressure from EU regulators. Read full story рҹҮ§рҹҮ· Brazil's Central Bank Proposes Stablecoin Transfer Holds Brazil's central bank is proposing mandatory 24-hour holds on large dollar-stablecoin transfers as part of new compliance measures. The rule would primarily affect cross-border transactions and could raise costs for service providers operating in the country. More details рҹҸў Securitize Tokenizes $295M in Stock on Solana at IPO Securitize brought $295 million worth of stock onto Solana as part of a fresh IPO, marking one of the network's largest tokenized-equit
